findings.description: s3 has an empty title ("") but it represents the intro portion of the named h2 section「開発時のログの見方」. s4 takes the h2 title instead. For document-level intro (s1), empty title is appropriate, but s3 is an interior section belonging to a named h2 — the title split leaves s3 untitled while both sections cover the same h2.
PascalCase class names `HttpResponse` and `UserSearchAction` appear in the code example within s4 but are absent from s4's hints.
findings.source_evidence: method not found. class = [nablarch.sample.management.user.UserSearchAction], method signature = [HttpResponse dousers00101(HttpRequest, ExecutionContext)]
